title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Behavior Case: Python Try Else Finally
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python try else finally increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use try, except, else, and finally so protected work, success work, and cleanup have distinct roles.
Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
